name: llm-eval-harness
description: A provider-agnostic LLM evaluation harness: golden dataset, deterministic + LLM-as-judge scoring, RAG retrieval/generation separation, red-team suite, severity-weighted CI gate, drift tracking, and an HTML/markdown scorecard. Runs with no API key using a built-in stub model.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test eval/tests/score.test.ts eval/tests/rag.test.ts eval/tests/judge.test.ts eval/tests/schema.test.ts eval/tests/golden.test.ts

author: Yousuf Waqar
